The bioactive constituents of Lithospermum corymbosum include lithospermic acid, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. 

Common herbal preparations made with Lithospermum corymbosum include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions such as hypertension, heart failure, and edema.
